response.justification: Despite extensive software experience, the candidate lacks Java-focused project work, has only basic German language skills (a hard requirement), and holds senior roles inconsistent with an entry-level position, making them overqualified and a poor cultural/linguistic fit for the advertised junior role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Strong contributions to open-source and community-driven tech initiatives
Demonstrated expertise in agile practices, CI/CD, and test-driven development
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, not sufficient for client collaboration
No clear Java project experience despite listing it as a skill
Senior-level titles and experience vastly exceed entry-level role expectations
